title: senecio cedrorum
intro: Senecio cedrorum, also known as Cedar Sow Thistle, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Senecio cedrorum include its ability to treat fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to clean wounds. Senecio cedrorum is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and it can also be used in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
